summary: Generic CBOR tag 100 wrapping an integer. Under R7, generic tagged items are forbidden in canonical preimage output except where a specific Trellis spec section explicitly names a tag. The Rust oracle today passes tagged values through (R7 is inert; no Trellis preimage shape introduces a generic tag as input). A conformant runtime that implements an R7 allowlist MUST surface reject_code=generic_tag_disallowed.
notes: Rust oracle today: returns pass with output_hex=d864 01 (tag 100, content uint 1). The adapter reports result=unimplemented to reflect that the Rust oracle does not yet enforce R7 — the case is present for forward-compatibility documentation. Adapters implementing the allowlist surface result=pass with reject_code=generic_tag_disallowed.
